ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Western, Eastern) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Northwest, Pacific) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA, G-League) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of team statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played in the season */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Wins in the season */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Losses in the season */,
  "win_percent" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "points" REAL /* Points scored in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* Field goals made in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Field goals attempted in the game */,
  "field_goal_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_points_made" REAL /* Three-point shots made in the game */,
  "three_points_attempted" REAL /* Three-point shots attempted in the game */,
  "three_point_percent" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* Free throws made in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Free throws attempted in the game */,
  "free_throw_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "offensive_rebounds" REAL /* Offensive rebounds in the game */,
  "defensive_rebounds" REAL /* Defensive rebounds in the game */,
  "total_rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds in the game */,
  "assists" REAL /* Assists in the game */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Turnovers in the game */,
  "steals" REAL /* Steals in the game */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Blocks in the game */,
  "blocks_against" REAL /* Blocks against in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" REAL /* Personal fouls in the game */,
  "personal_fouls_drawn" REAL /* Personal fouls drawn in the game */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating in the game */,
  "shot_clock_percentage" REAL /* Shot clock percentage */,
  "fast_break_points" REAL /* Fast break points */,
  "points_in_paint" REAL /* Points in paint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, finals) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the comparison */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the comparison */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the comparison is made */,
  "team1_points" REAL /* Average points scored by team1 */,
  "team2_points" REAL /* Average points scored by team2 */,
  "team1_field_goal_percent" REAL /* Average field goal percentage of team1 */,
  "team2_field_goal_percent" REAL /* Average field goal percentage of team2 */,
  "team1_three_point_percent" REAL /* Average three-point shooting percentage of team1 */,
  "team2_three_point_percent" REAL /* Average three-point shooting percentage of team2 */,
  "team1_free_throw_percent" REAL /* Average free throw percentage of team1 */,
  "team2_free_throw_percent" REAL /* Average free throw percentage of team2 */,
  "team1_rebounds" REAL /* Average total rebounds of team1 */,
  "team2_rebounds" REAL /* Average total rebounds of team2 */,
  "team1_assists" REAL /* Average assists of team1 */,
  "team2_assists" REAL /* Average assists of team2 */,
  "team1_turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers of team1 */,
  "team2_turnovers" REAL /* Average turnovers of team2 */,
  "team1_steals" REAL /* Average steals of team1 */,
  "team2_steals" REAL /* Average steals of team2 */,
  "team1_blocks" REAL /* Average blocks of team1 */,
  "team2_blocks" REAL /* Average blocks of team2 */,
  "team1_plus_minus" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating of team1 */,
  "team2_plus_minus" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating of team2 */,
  "team1_fast_break_points" REAL /* Average fast break points of team1 */,
  "team2_fast_break_points" REAL /* Average fast break points of team2 */,
  "team1_points_in_paint" REAL /* Average points in paint of team1 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_comparisons_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_comparisons_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_field_goals_made" REAL /* Total field goals made by the team in the season */,
  "total_field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total field goals attempted by the team in the season */,
  "total_three_points_made" REAL /* Total three-point shots made by the team in the season */,
  "total_three_points_attempted" REAL /* Total three-point shots attempted by the team in the season */,
  "total_free_throws_made" REAL /* Total free throws made by the team in the season */,
  "total_free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Total free throws attempted by the team in the season */,
  "total_rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds by the team in the season */,
  "total_assists" REAL /* Total assists by the team in the season */,
  "total_turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers by the team in the season */,
  "total_steals" REAL /* Total steals by the team in the season */,
  "total_blocks" REAL /* Total blocks by the team in the season */,
  "total_personal_fouls" REAL /* Total personal fouls by the team in the season */,
  "total_personal_fouls_drawn" REAL /* Total personal fouls drawn by the team in the season */,
  "total_plus_minus" REAL /* Total plus-minus rating by the team in the season */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_team_statistics" (
  "advanced_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of advanced team statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating of the team */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating of the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  "effective_field_goal_percent" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage of the team */,
  "true_shooting_percent" REAL /* True shooting percentage of the team */,
  "assist_ratio" REAL /* Assist ratio of the team */,
  "turnover_ratio" REAL /* Turnover ratio of the team */,
  "rebounds_ratio" REAL /* Rebounds ratio of the team */,
  "blocks_ratio" REAL /* Blocks ratio of the team */,
  "steals_ratio" REAL /* Steals ratio of the team */,
  "fouls_ratio" REAL /* Fouls ratio of the team */,
  "plus_minus_ratio" REAL /* Plus-minus ratio of the team */,
  "fast_break_points_ratio" REAL /* Fast break points ratio of the team */,
  "points_in_paint_ratio" REAL /* Points in paint ratio of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advanced_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_player_statistics" (
  "advanced_player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of advanced player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percent" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "three_point_attempt_rate" REAL /* Three-point attempt rate */,
  "free_throw_attempt_rate" REAL /* Free throw attempt rate */,
  "offensive_rebound_percent" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "defensive_rebound_percent" REAL /* Defensive rebound percentage */,
  "total_rebound_percent" REAL /* Total rebound percentage */,
  "assist_percent" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "steal_percent" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "block_percent" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  "turnover_percent" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "usage_percent" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win shares */,
  "win_shares_per_48_minutes" REAL /* Win shares per 48 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advanced_player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "viewed_statistics" TEXT /* Specific statistics viewed by the user */,
  "downloaded_data" INTEGER /* Whether the user downloaded any data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "can_view_team_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view team statistics */,
  "can_view_player_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view player statistics */,
  "can_view_game_logs" INTEGER /* Permission to view game logs */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Permission to manage users */,
  "can_view_advanced_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view advanced statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, shoulder) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., day-to-day, out for season) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
